title: 📱 Android App Architecture (Kotlin & Jetpack Compose)
text: Act as a software architecture engineer expert in Android development. I want to build an advanced local tourist guide app using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose. Please provide an application structure based on Clean Architecture and MVVM. Write the core code for: 1. Data layer (Repository) to interact with a local database (Room). 2. State management in the user interface. 3. Design an interactive main screen to display tourist attractions while applying UI/UX and performance best practices.

title: 🏆 Competitive Programming Algorithms
text: Act as an expert competitive programming coach and former contest participant (ICPC / SCPC). I have a programming problem that requires improving time and space complexity. I will give you the problem description and I want you to: 1. Analyze the problem mathematically and logically. 2. Propose two algorithms (one brute-force and one optimized using techniques such as Dynamic Programming or Graph Theory). 3. Write the optimal solution in C++ or Python with a detailed explanation of how the algorithm works to avoid Time Limit Exceeded.

title: 🛡️ Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Protection
text: Act as a cybersecurity consultant and penetration tester. We are securing critical network infrastructure. Write a comprehensive Security Audit Plan that includes: 1. Identifying potential vulnerabilities in routing protocols. 2. How to set up an advanced firewall to prevent DDoS attacks. 3. A starter Python script for scanning open ports (port scanner) and producing an automated report of potential vulnerabilities.

title: 💼 Launch & Marketing for a Tech Startup (B2B SaaS)
text: Act as a business development expert and strategic analyst for B2B tech startups. We are launching a startup focused on network automation and infrastructure security. Design a professional Go-To-Market strategy that includes: 1. Crafting the unique value proposition. 2. A LinkedIn cold outreach strategy targeting CTOs. 3. Landing page structure to increase conversion rate.

title: 📈 Algorithmic Trading & Digital Asset Management (Crypto & Web3)
text: Act as a financial data analyst and Web3 developer. I want to build an automated trading bot that connects to the Binance API. Write the program logic (Python) that: 1. Fetches real-time prices for pairs like BTC/USDT. 2. Applies RSI and moving averages (MA) to determine entry and exit points. 3. Adds a strict risk management system (stop-loss and take-profit) to protect the portfolio.

title: 🎥 Tech Reels Production
text: Act as a professional tech content creator and video editing expert. I want to produce a series of professional short Reels. Write a full production plan for a 60-second video explaining 'AI tools for developers'. The plan should include: 1. A strong hook for the first 3 seconds. 2. A detailed voiceover script. 3. Visual editing directions for tools like InShot or CapCut (when to place B-roll, when to use transitions, and captions).

title: 🤖 Prompt Engineering & AI Interface Design (AI Tools Education)
text: Act as a technical trainer specialized in AI tools. I want to design an interactive UI for an educational platform. Use advanced prompt engineering techniques to produce: 1. A coherent color palette that reflects technological sophistication. 2. A detailed description of UI components such as navigation buttons and interactive cards. 3. Basic CSS/HTML and JS code to build a prototype for the platform's main showcase page.

title: ⚙️ Machine Learning Pipeline Design
text: Act as a machine learning engineer. I want to build a complete data pipeline for training a predictive model. Write the programming and conceptual steps using Python (Scikit-Learn or TensorFlow) to: 1. Clean and preprocess raw data. 2. Perform feature engineering. 3. Choose a suitable training algorithm and perform hyperparameter tuning. 4. Evaluate model performance to avoid overfitting.

title: 🛠️ Tech Team Structuring & Project Management
text: Act as a Technical Product Manager experienced in Agile. We are a freelance team of four working on an integrated software project (mobile app and web dashboard). Design a detailed one-month sprint plan that includes: 1. Task allocation for development and UI/UX. 2. Git and GitHub strategy (repository management and forks among team members). 3. Progress tracking tools to ensure on-time delivery.

title: 🏥 Premium Medical Ad Design (Nano Banana Pro)
text:
Role: You are Creative Director + Performance Marketer + Premium Branding Specialist specializing in high-converting medical clinic ads.
Objective: Create a premium Arabic direct-response ad for [Project Name] for [dental clinic / dermatology / lab / general clinic], suitable for Instagram / Facebook / TikTok / Snapchat in 9:16, 4:5, and 1:1 formats.
Project Info: Project Name [Project Name], Phone [Phone Number], WhatsApp [WhatsApp Number], Address [Address], Account [@username]; use official logo only if provided.
Target Audience: Families and individuals seeking a reliable nearby healthcare service.
Customer Pain Point: The customer wants a trustworthy, attractive option and not a generic or unclear ad.
Customer Desire: Reliable, respectful care with a clear quick booking via WhatsApp.
Offer: Initial check or consultation at a special price if permitted — present inside a badge or clear banner.
Decision Trigger: Limited time / limited quantity / book now before the offer ends.
Scene Direction: Design a premium, clean scene that makes the clinic the hero, with an industry-appropriate background, soft commercial lighting, and realistic details that convey quality.
Visual Composition: Lead the eye from the product to the headline, then the offer, CTA button, and footer. Leave safe area for phones and avoid clutter.
Arabic Copy Inside Design: Headline: Clearer Care, Closer Attention; Subheadline: Organized medical service, easy appointments, and a team that cares about your experience; Offer bar: Initial check or consultation at a special price if permitted; Action line: Don't miss the offer; CTA button: Book your appointment; Footer: [Project Name] | [WhatsApp Number] | [Address].
Branding Rules: Maintain a Premium Direct Response identity, do not use fake logos, do not invent data, and keep Arabic text clean.
Output Requirements: 4K and 8K, hyper-detailed, ultra clean, ad-ready, correct Arabic text, production-ready.
Negative Instructions: Do not distort the product, do not overcrowd the design, do not make the CTA weak, do not use broken Arabic text, do not include distracting elements.
Contact & WhatsApp Branding: Project Name: [Project Name] | Contact/WhatsApp: [WhatsApp Number] | Add official WhatsApp icon next to the number inside CTA and footer clearly; do not use any other number.

title: 👕 Casual Apparel Sales Ad (Nano Banana Pro)
text:
Role: You are Creative Director + Performance Marketer + Premium Branding Specialist specializing in high-converting casual apparel ads.
Objective: Create a premium Arabic direct-response ad for [Project Name] selling [t-shirts / pants / hoodies / daily sets], suitable for Instagram / Facebook / TikTok / Snapchat in 9:16, 4:5, and 1:1 formats.
Project Info: Project Name [Project Name], Phone [Phone Number], WhatsApp [WhatsApp Number], Address [Address], Account [@username]; use official logo only if provided.
Target Audience: Young men and women looking for practical, trendy clothing at a good price.
Customer Pain Point: The customer wants a reliable, attractive option and not a generic or unclear ad.
Customer Desire: Comfortable, stylish everyday looks with easy ordering via WhatsApp.
Offer: Weekend discount — present inside a badge or clear banner.
Decision Trigger: Limited time / limited quantity / order now before the offer ends.
Scene Direction: Design a premium, clean scene that makes the product the hero, with an appropriate background, soft commercial lighting, and realistic details that show quality.
Visual Composition: Lead the eye from the product to the headline, then the offer, CTA button, and footer. Leave safe area for phones and avoid clutter.
Arabic Copy Inside Design: Headline: Daily Style That Turns Heads; Subheadline: Comfortable and trendy designs for your day; Offer bar: Weekend discount; Action line: Don't miss the offer; CTA button: Shop Now; Footer: [Project Name] | [WhatsApp Number] | [Address].
Branding Rules: Maintain a Premium Direct Response identity, do not use fake logos, do not invent data, and keep Arabic text clean.
Output Requirements: 4K and 8K, hyper-detailed, ultra clean, ad-ready, correct Arabic text, production-ready.
Negative Instructions: Do not distort the product, do not overcrowd the design, do not make the CTA weak, do not use broken Arabic text, do not include distracting elements.
Contact & WhatsApp Branding: Project Name: [Project Name] | Contact/WhatsApp: [WhatsApp Number] | Add official WhatsApp icon next to the number inside CTA and footer clearly; do not use any other number.

title: ✈️ Travel & Flight Booking Ad (GPT Image 2)
text:
Create a premium Arabic direct-response advertising image for [flight bookings / visas / tour packages] under the brand [Project Name]. The creative must look like a high-end commercial ad but remain built for conversion and WhatsApp inquiries.
Use a realistic premium product/service scene that communicates: Your trip made easier and faster. Make the main subject visually dominant, sharp, polished, and easy to understand on mobile.
Include Arabic text hierarchy inside the design: Headline: Book Your Trip with Confidence; Subheadline: Fast, clear flight and travel services at fair prices; Offer badge: Free travel consultation; Action line: Request today and benefit; CTA button: Contact to Book; Footer with [Project Name] + [WhatsApp Number] + [Address/Account].
Visual style: Luxury commercial advertising, clean layout, soft studio/cinematic lighting, high contrast for readable Arabic typography, strong safe area for 9:16 / 4:5 / 1:1 formats.
Marketing direction: Focus on clear benefit, trust, urgency, and immediate action. The ad should be ready for Facebook, Instagram Reels, Stories, and Click-to-WhatsApp campaigns.
Quality: 4K and 8K visual quality, hyper-detailed, ultra clean, premium branding, mobile-first.
Avoid: fake logos, invented contact data, distorted Arabic text, clutter, low-resolution product, weak CTA, confusing layout, exaggerated claims.
Contact & WhatsApp Branding: Project Name: [Project Name] | Contact/WhatsApp: [WhatsApp Number] | Add official WhatsApp icon next to the number inside CTA and footer clearly; do not use any other number.

title: 🍲 Traditional Restaurant & Local Cuisine Ad (Nano Banana Pro)
text:
Role: You are Creative Director + Performance Marketer + Premium Branding Specialist specializing in high-converting traditional cuisine ads.
Objective: Create a premium Arabic direct-response ad for [Project Name] for [mandi / kabsa / zarbiyan / Yemeni dishes], suitable for Instagram / Facebook / TikTok / Snapchat in 9:16, 4:5, and 1:1 formats.
Project Info: Project Name [Project Name], Phone [Phone Number], WhatsApp [WhatsApp Number], Address [Address], Account [@username]; use official logo only if provided.
Target Audience: Families, office workers, and lovers of traditional food and group orders.
Customer Pain Point: The customer wants a reliable, attractive option and not a generic or unclear ad.
Customer Desire: A filling authentic meal with quick ordering via WhatsApp.
Offer: Free delivery for large orders — present inside a badge or clear banner.
Decision Trigger: Limited time / limited quantity / book now before the offer ends.
Scene Direction: Design a premium, clean scene that makes the dish the hero, with an appropriate background, soft commercial lighting, and realistic details that highlight quality.
Visual Composition: Lead the eye from the product to the headline, then the offer, CTA button, and footer. Leave safe area for phones and avoid clutter.
Arabic Copy Inside Design: Headline: Authentic Taste That Satisfies; Subheadline: Hot traditional meals prepared daily with the finest ingredients; Offer bar: Free delivery for large orders; Action line: Don't miss the offer; CTA button: Order Your Meal Now; Footer: [Project Name] | [WhatsApp Number] | [Address].
Branding Rules: Maintain a Premium Direct Response identity, do not use fake logos, do not invent data, and keep Arabic text clean.
Output Requirements: 4K and 8K, hyper-detailed, ultra clean, ad-ready, correct Arabic text, production-ready.
Negative Instructions: Do not distort the product, do not overcrowd the design, do not make the CTA weak, do not use broken Arabic text, do not include distracting elements.
Contact & WhatsApp Branding: Project Name: [Project Name] | Contact/WhatsApp: [WhatsApp Number] | Add official WhatsApp icon next to the number inside CTA and footer clearly; do not use any other number.

title: 🍔 Restaurant / Fast Food Ad (Video)
text:
Create a premium Arabic fast-food advertisement video, vertical 9:16, 10 seconds.
Hero product: [burger / pizza / fried chicken / drink].
Scene: modern fast-food restaurant, bright commercial lighting, appetizing close-ups.
Action: cheese pull / sauce pour / crispy steam / hand picks up the product.
Camera: macro close-up, slow-motion food movement, quick final push-in.
Text in Arabic: 'A taste that brings you back' + 'Today's offer' + 'Order Now'.
Audio: sizzling food sounds, upbeat music, Arabic voiceover.
Negative: no fake logo, no messy food, no distorted hands, no broken Arabic.

title: 💻 Digital Service Ad (Video)
text:
Create a premium Arabic digital service ad video, vertical 9:16, 15 seconds.
Service: [service].
Visuals: modern phone and laptop UI mockups, clean blue/orange tech style, fast animated icons.
Structure: problem -> solution -> benefits -> CTA.
Arabic text: 'Save your time' / 'Faster results' / 'Start now'.
Camera: smooth motion graphics, clean transitions.
Audio: confident Arabic voiceover, modern tech beat.
Negative: no fake app screenshots, no unreadable tiny text, no clutter.

title: 👤 Faceless Educational/Informational Video
text:
Create a faceless educational AI video, vertical 9:16, 30 seconds.
Topic: [topic].
Visual style: clean animated scenes, screen recordings, icons, kinetic Arabic typography.
Narration: Arabic voiceover explaining 3 clear points.
Scene sequence: hook, point 1, point 2, point 3, final CTA.
Captions: large Arabic RTL subtitles, highlighted keywords.
Audio: calm confident narration, light background music.
Negative: no random stock footage, no crowded captions, no broken Arabic.

title: 🗣️ UGC-style Customer Testimonial Video (Product Review)
text:
Create a realistic UGC-style testimonial video, vertical 9:16, 25 seconds.
Presenter: natural adult Arabic speaker, casual smartphone framing.
Scene: home or office, realistic lighting, authentic feel.
Script: 'I used [product/service] because I had [problem]. The thing I liked most was [feature]. Within [timeframe] I noticed [result]. If you want [desire], try it now / message them on WhatsApp.'
Camera: handheld phone video, slight natural movement.
Captions: Arabic RTL, clean and readable.
Negative: no overacting, no fake luxury style, no robotic face, no lip sync errors.

title: ⚡ Trending Quick Tip Video
text:
Create a trendy Arabic short video, vertical 9:16, 12 seconds.
Hook: 'Don't start your ad before you know this thing'
Topic: [marketing / AI / design tip].
Style: kinetic typography, fast zoom cuts, screen overlays, bold Arabic captions.
Sequence: hook -> mistake -> correct method -> CTA.
Audio: upbeat trend-style beat, quick whoosh transitions.
CTA: 'Save it and try it today'.
Negative: no long paragraphs, no slow pacing, no unreadable text.

title: 📦 10-Second Product Ad (Professional)
text:
Create a premium Arabic product advertisement video, vertical 9:16, 10 seconds.
Main subject: [product name] as the hero, centered and highly detailed.
Scene: modern premium studio background using brand colors [colors].
Action: the product rotates slowly, light reflections reveal texture, then a clean offer badge appears.
Camera: slow dolly-in, smooth cinematic movement, shallow depth of field.
Lighting: soft commercial lighting, elegant highlights, realistic shadows.
On-screen Arabic text: '[headline]' then '[benefit 1] • [benefit 2] • [benefit 3]' then CTA 'Order Now'.
Audio: energetic Arabic commercial voiceover, subtle whoosh transitions, premium background music.
Quality: sharp, realistic, 4K feel, mobile readable.
Negative: no fake logo, no incorrect Arabic, no extra products, no clutter, no watermark.

title: 🎙️ Personal Video with AI Speaker
text:
Create a realistic personal-brand talking video.
Presenter: professional adult Arabic-speaking presenter, confident and friendly, modern business casual style.
Scene: clean modern office/studio, soft background blur.
Camera: medium close-up, eye-level, subtle natural movement.
Script language: Arabic.
Script: '[write the script here]'.
Tone: trustworthy, energetic, educational, direct.
On-screen captions: large Arabic RTL captions, keyword highlights only.
Format: vertical 9:16, 30 seconds, social media ready.
Negative: no robotic facial expressions, no wrong lip sync, no broken Arabic captions, no exaggerated gestures.

title: 🔥 Fast Trendy Video (Dynamic)
text:
Create a fast-paced trendy vertical video for social media.
Topic: [topic].
Hook text in Arabic: '[hook]'.
Visual style: energetic kinetic typography, quick cuts, modern social media aesthetic.
Scenes: 5 micro-scenes, each 1-2 seconds, matching the script.
Camera: handheld energy, zoom cuts, quick push-ins, dynamic transitions.
Text: large Arabic RTL captions, high contrast, mobile readable.
Audio: upbeat trending-style beat, subtle whooshes, optional Arabic voiceover.
Format: vertical 9:16, 12 seconds.
Negative: no crowded text, no outdated stock visuals, no unreadable Arabic, no watermark.

title: 🎬 Custom General Template (for any AI video)
text:
Create a high-quality AI video clip.
Goal: [what this shot must achieve].
Main subject: [product/person/object].
Action: [exact action happening in the shot].
Scene: [location/background/context].
Camera: [shot type + camera movement].
Lighting: [lighting style].
Visual style: [commercial / cinematic / UGC / trendy / documentary].
Audio: [Arabic voiceover / dialogue / sound effects / music / ambience].
On-screen Arabic text: [clear RTL Arabic text].
Duration: [5-10 seconds].
Aspect ratio: [9:16 / 4:5 / 1:1 / 16:9].
Quality: sharp, realistic, premium, social-media ready.
Negative instructions: no fake logos, no broken Arabic text, no distorted hands, no watermark, no visual clutter, no unreadable small text.

title: 🚀 Master Prompt (for managing a full video campaign)
text:
Act as an AI Video Creative Director + Direct Response Copywriter + Arabic Social Media Strategist. I will give you a project brief. Your task is to create a complete AI video production package.
PROJECT BRIEF:
Brand/Project: [Project Name]
Product/Service: [Product or Service]
Target Audience: [Audience]
Platform: [TikTok / Instagram Reels / Facebook / YouTube Shorts / WhatsApp Status]
Video Duration: [15 / 20 / 30 seconds]
Goal: [sales / WhatsApp messages / awareness / personal branding / trend]
Offer: [the offer if any]
CTA: [Order Now / Message Us / Book / Subscribe]
Brand Colors: [colors]
Tone: [premium / youthful / direct / educational / UGC]

DELIVERABLES:
1. 10 Arabic hooks for the first 3 seconds.
2. 3 script versions: direct response, storytelling, and UGC.
3. A detailed shot list table: time, scene, camera, action, on-screen text, voiceover, tool to use.
4. AI video prompts for each shot suitable for Flow/Veo, Runway, Kling, or HeyGen.
5. Arabic voiceover script.
6. CapCut editing instructions.
7. Final caption for Facebook/Instagram.
8. Negative instructions to avoid broken Arabic text, fake logos, distorted faces/hands, and clutter.

Write everything in Arabic except the AI video prompts, which should be in clear English with Arabic text fields preserved exactly.

title: 🤖 ChatGPT Prompt (to write an ad script)
text:
You are a Direct Response copywriter and video director. Write a [20-second] Arabic video ad script for [Project Name] that offers/sells [product or service].
Target audience: [audience].
Customer problem: [problem].
Customer desire: [desire].
Offer: [the offer].
CTA: [Order Now / Message Us on WhatsApp].

Requirements:
1. 5 strong hooks for the first 3 seconds.
2. Final script divided by seconds.
3. Short on-screen texts.
4. Natural Arabic voiceover lines.
5. A shot list table for each shot.
6. An English video prompt for each shot while preserving Arabic text exactly.

title: ✨ Gemini Prompt (convert image/video to a prompt)
text:
Analyze the attached reference image or video, then build a professional video prompt suitable for Google Flow/Veo.
Required:
- Main scene description.
- Camera type, angle, and movement.
- Lighting and colors.
- Subject or product motion.
- Suggested Arabic on-screen text.
- Dialogue or Arabic voiceover if appropriate.
- Final English prompt for 8-10 seconds at 9:16.
- Negative instructions to avoid distorting Arabic text, faces, or adding fake logos.

title: 🧠 Claude Prompt (to improve an existing script)
text:
Review the following script as an expert in educational and ad video writing.
Required:
1. Identify weaknesses in Hook, pacing, clarity, and selling points.
2. Rewrite the script in stronger, more concise Arabic.
3. Make every sentence suitable for voiceover and captions.
4. Suggest an organized shot list.
5. Propose 3 different CTA variations.
6. Provide a final production-ready version.
Script: [place the script here]

title: 📈 Grok Prompt (to extract trend ideas)
text:
I want trendy short video ideas for [TikTok / Reels / X].
Niche: [marketing / AI / restaurants / products / personal brand].
Audience: [audience].
Required:
1. 20 very short hooks suitable for the first second.
2. 10 executable video ideas for 15 seconds.
3. For each idea: script, on-screen text, shot type, and suggested music/beat.
4. Keep language direct, fast, and engaging.
5. Avoid exaggeration and unverified claims.

title: 🛠️ Manus Prompt (to prepare a complete video project)
text:
Deliver a ready-to-execute AI short-video campaign.
Goal: e.g., 10 ad videos for a restaurant / 20 personal brand videos / 15 trend videos.
Project: [Project Name]
Audience: [Audience]
Platforms: [Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, WhatsApp]
Duration per video: [15-30 seconds]

Final deliverables:
1. A table of video ideas.
2. Script for each video.
3. Shot list for each video.
4. A generation prompt per shot.
5. Voiceover text.
6. CapCut editing instructions.
7. Caption and post text for each video.
8. A quality checklist.
Organize outputs in copyable tables and do not invent data like phone numbers or logos.

title: 🎥 Runway Template (Image-to-Video animation)
text:
Animate the uploaded image into a premium commercial shot.
The product must remain sharp and true to the reference image.
Motion: [describe exact product/background motion].
Camera: slow dolly-in with subtle parallax.
Lighting: soft cinematic highlights, realistic shadows.
Mood: premium, clean, modern, high-conversion advertisement.
No deformation, no change to product shape, no fake text, no extra logos.

title: 🗣️ Flow/Veo Template (AI-speaking scene)
text:
Create a cinematic Arabic-speaking video scene.
Scene purpose: [hook / product reveal / testimonial / CTA].
Character: [description].
Location: [description].
Action: [clear action].
Camera: [framing + movement].
Dialogue in Arabic: '[the Arabic line to be spoken]'.
Audio: natural voice, realistic room ambience, subtle music.
Style: realistic premium commercial, clean composition.
Duration: 8 seconds, aspect ratio 9:16.
Negative: no lip-sync errors, no broken Arabic text, no distorted faces, no fake logos.

title: 🎞️ Kling Template (generate coherent realistic scenes)
text:
Generate a realistic short-form commercial video.
Shot 1: [opening action].
Shot 2: [product/person interaction].
Shot 3: [final CTA moment].
Maintain subject consistency across shots.
Camera: dynamic but smooth, commercial pacing.
Audio: natural synced sound and Arabic voiceover.
Format: 9:16, 15 seconds.
Negative: avoid inconsistent appearances, broken motion, fake brand marks, unreadable Arabic.

title: 📝 Direct Response Ad Script Template (ready text)
text:
Problem: Are you struggling with [problem]?
Solution: With [product/service name] you get [the result].
Benefits: [benefit 1], [benefit 2], [benefit 3].
Offer: [offer/discount/gift].
CTA: Message us now and book/order.

title: 💬 UGC Script Template (user-generated content)
text:
I tried [product/service] because I had [problem].
What I liked most was [feature].
Within [timeframe] I noticed [result].
If you're looking for [desire], try it now / message them on WhatsApp.

title: 📚 Educational Video Script Template
text:
Hook: Most people make this mistake in [topic].
Point 1: [short fact].
Point 2: [short fact].
Point 3: [short fact].
Conclusion: Try this method and save the video.

title: 📈 Trending Video Script Template
text:
Do you know why [surprising result]?
Reason 1: [point].
Reason 2: [point].
The right method: [solution].
Type the word [word] if you want the template.

title: ⏱️ Ready 20-Second Ad Script
text:
Looking for [the solution/result]?
With [product/service name] you get [main benefit] quickly and with quality.
[benefit 1], [benefit 2], [benefit 3].
The offer is available now for a limited time.
Message us on WhatsApp and order now.
